---
title: "Benchmarking"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-08"
---

# Loading Libraries and Simulation Data
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(spatstat.geom)
library(spatstat.random)
library(spatstat.explore)
library(SpatialExperiment)
library(spicyR)
library(TreeBH)
library(DART)
library(dplyr)
source("pfilter.R")
```


```{r}
spe <- readRDS("spe.rds")
spe_pairs <- readRDS("spe_pairs.rds")
```
# Helper Functions

```{r}
canonical_pair <- function(x) {
  ab <- strsplit(x, "__", fixed = TRUE)
  vapply(ab, function(z) paste(sort(z), collapse = "__"), character(1))
}

run_spicy_contrast <- function(spe, cond_A, cond_B, level = c("sub", "major")) {
  level <- match.arg(level)
  cell_col <- if (level == "sub") "cellType_sub" else "cellType_major"

  spe2 <- spe[, spe$condition %in% c(cond_A, cond_B)]
  spe2$condition <- droplevels(spe2$condition)
  spe2$imageID   <- droplevels(spe2$imageID)
  spe2[[cell_col]] <- droplevels(spe2[[cell_col]])

  spicy(
    spe2,
    condition = "condition",
    subject   = "subject",
    cellType  = cell_col,
    imageID   = "imageID"
  )
}

MAJOR_MAP <- c(CD4="T", CD8="T", Treg="T", B="B", NK="NK")

canonical_pair <- function(x) {
  ab <- strsplit(x, "__", fixed = TRUE)
  vapply(ab, function(z) paste(sort(z), collapse="__"), character(1))
}

bh_reject <- function(p, q = 0.05) {
  p <- as.numeric(p)
  m <- length(p)
  o <- order(p)
  ps <- p[o]
  thr <- (seq_len(m) / m) * q
  k <- max(which(ps <= thr), 0)
  out <- rep(FALSE, m)
  if (k > 0) out[o[seq_len(k)]] <- TRUE
  out
}

extract_leaf_stats <- function(spicy_sub, conditionB, eps = 1e-12) {
  colB <- paste0("condition", conditionB)

  tibble(
    interaction = rownames(spicy_sub$p.value),
    leaf = canonical_pair(rownames(spicy_sub$p.value)),
    pval = as.numeric(spicy_sub$p.value[, colB]),
    coef = as.numeric(spicy_sub$coefficient[, colB])
  ) %>%
    distinct(leaf, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(pval = pmin(pmax(pval, eps), 1 - eps))
}

extract_major_pvals <- function(spicy_major, conditionB, eps = 1e-12) {
  colB <- paste0("condition", conditionB)

  tibble(
    interaction = rownames(spicy_major$p.value),
    fam = canonical_pair(rownames(spicy_major$p.value)),
    p_major = as.numeric(spicy_major$p.value[, colB])
  ) %>%
    distinct(fam, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(p_major = pmin(pmax(p_major, eps), 1 - eps))
}
```

# Running spicyR 

## `spe` Object

```{r}
conds <- c(
  "LeafSignal_TtoNK_weak",     "LeafSignal_TtoNK_medium",     "LeafSignal_TtoNK_strong",
  "InternalSignal_TtoNK_weak", "InternalSignal_TtoNK_medium", "InternalSignal_TtoNK_strong",
  "LeafSignal_NKtoCD4_weak",   "LeafSignal_NKtoCD4_medium",   "LeafSignal_NKtoCD4_strong",
  "InternalSignal_NKtoT_weak", "InternalSignal_NKtoT_medium", "InternalSignal_NKtoT_strong"
)

spicy_sub_list <- setNames(
  lapply(conds, function(cc) {
    run_spicy_contrast(
      spe    = spe,
      cond_A = "Null",
      cond_B = cc,
      level  = "sub"
    )
  }),
  conds
)

spicy_major_list <- setNames(
  lapply(conds, function(cc) {
    run_spicy_contrast(
      spe    = spe,
      cond_A = "Null",
      cond_B = cc,
      level  = "major"
    )
  }),
  conds
)
```

## `spe_pairs`Object

```{r}
pair_table <- tibble(
  scenario = c(
    "Leaf_TtoNK",
    "Internal_TtoNK",
    "Leaf_NKtoCD4",
    "Internal_NKtoT"
  ),
  cond_A = c(
    "Control_Leaf_TtoNK_0p2",
    "Control_Internal_TtoNK_0p2",
    "Control_Leaf_NKtoCD4_0p2",
    "Control_Internal_NKtoT_0p2"
  ),
  cond_B = c(
    "Treatment_Leaf_TtoNK_0p5",
    "Treatment_Internal_TtoNK_0p5",
    "Treatment_Leaf_NKtoCD4_0p5",
    "Treatment_Internal_NKtoT_0p5"
  )
)

spicy_pairs_sub <- setNames(
  lapply(seq_len(nrow(pair_table)), function(i) {
    run_spicy_contrast(
      spe    = spe_pairs,
      cond_A = pair_table$cond_A[i],
      cond_B = pair_table$cond_B[i],
      level  = "sub"
    )
  }),
  pair_table$scenario
)

spicy_pairs_major <- setNames(
  lapply(seq_len(nrow(pair_table)), function(i) {
    run_spicy_contrast(
      spe    = spe_pairs,
      cond_A = pair_table$cond_A[i],
      cond_B = pair_table$cond_B[i],
      level  = "major"
    )
  }),
  pair_table$scenario
)
```

```{r}
saveRDS(spicy_sub_list, "spicy_sub_list.rds")
saveRDS(spicy_major_list, "spicy_major_list.rds")
```

## Sanity Checks

```{r}
topPairs(spicy_sub_list[["LeafSignal_TtoNK_weak"]])
topPairs(spicy_major_list[["LeafSignal_TtoNK_weak"]])

topPairs(spicy_pairs_sub[["Leaf_TtoNK"]])
topPairs(spicy_pairs_major[["Leaf_TtoNK"]])
```

# Contrast Table

## `spe`

```{r}
contrast_table_null <- tibble(
  scenario = names(spicy_sub_list),
  cond_B   = names(spicy_sub_list),
  type     = "null_vs_signal"
)
contrast_table_null
```

## `spe_pairs`

```{r}
contrast_table_pairs <- pair_table %>%
  transmute(
    scenario = scenario,
    cond_B   = cond_B,
    type     = "control_vs_treatment"
  )

contrast_table_pairs
```

# Running Different Methods

## Plain BH

### `spe`

```{r}
bh_null_df <- purrr::imap_dfr(spicy_sub_list, \(sp_obj, cc) {
  extract_leaf_stats(sp_obj, conditionB = cc) %>%
    mutate(
      scenario = cc,
      reject_BH = bh_reject(pval, q = 0.05)
    )
})
```

### `spe_pairs`

```{r}
bh_pairs_df <- purrr::imap_dfr(spicy_pairs_sub, \(sp_obj, scenario) {
  cond_B <- pair_table$cond_B[match(scenario, pair_table$scenario)]

  extract_leaf_stats(sp_obj, conditionB = cond_B) %>%
    mutate(
      scenario = scenario,
      reject_BH = bh_reject(pval, q = 0.05)
    )
})
```

## TreeBH

```{r}
build_treebh_inputs <- function(spicy_sub, conditionB,
                                major_map = MAJOR_MAP,
                                eps = 1e-12) {
  df_leaf <- extract_leaf_stats(spicy_sub, conditionB = conditionB, eps = eps) %>%
    tidyr::separate(leaf, into = c("a", "b"), sep = "__", remove = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(
      ma = unname(major_map[a]),
      mb = unname(major_map[b]),
      fam = canonical_pair(paste(ma, mb, sep = "__"))
    ) %>%
    select(leaf, fam, pval, coef)

  groups <- cbind(
    level1 = as.integer(factor(df_leaf$fam)),
    level2 = as.integer(factor(paste(df_leaf$fam, df_leaf$leaf, sep = "/")))
  )

  list(
    df_leaf = df_leaf,
    pvals   = df_leaf$pval,
    groups  = groups
  )
}

run_treebh <- function(spicy_sub, conditionB,
                       q = c(0.2, 0.2),
                       major_map = MAJOR_MAP,
                       eps = 1e-12) {

  inp <- build_treebh_inputs(
    spicy_sub  = spicy_sub,
    conditionB = conditionB,
    major_map  = major_map,
    eps        = eps
  )

  res <- TreeBH::get_TreeBH_selections(
    pvals  = inp$pvals,
    groups = inp$groups,
    q      = q
  )

  leaf_reject <- (res[, 2] == 1)

  inp$df_leaf %>%
    mutate(reject_TreeBH = leaf_reject)
}
```


### `spe`

```{r}
treebh_null_df <- purrr::imap_dfr(spicy_sub_list, \(sp_obj, cc) {
  run_treebh(
    spicy_sub  = sp_obj,
    conditionB = cc,
    q          = c(0.2, 0.2)
  ) %>%
    mutate(scenario = cc)
})
```


### `spe_pairs`

```{r}
treebh_pairs_df <- purrr::imap_dfr(spicy_pairs_sub, \(sp_obj, scenario) {
  cond_B <- pair_table$cond_B[match(scenario, pair_table$scenario)]

  run_treebh(
    spicy_sub  = sp_obj,
    conditionB = cond_B,
    q          = c(0.2, 0.2)
  ) %>%
    mutate(scenario = scenario)
})
```

## DART

```{r}
extract_leaf_for_dart <- function(spicy_sub, conditionB, eps = 1e-10) {
  df <- extract_leaf_stats(spicy_sub, conditionB = conditionB, eps = eps) %>%
    arrange(leaf)

  list(
    df = df,
    pvals = setNames(df$pval, df$leaf),
    coefs = setNames(df$coef, df$leaf)
  )
}

make_hypothesis_distance <- function(leaf_names, major_map = MAJOR_MAP) {

  cell_dist <- function(x, y) {
    if (x == y) return(0L)
    if (major_map[[x]] == major_map[[y]]) return(1L)
    2L
  }

  parse_pair <- function(s) {
    ab <- strsplit(s, "__", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
    ab <- sort(ab)
    list(a = ab[1], b = ab[2])
  }

  pairs <- lapply(leaf_names, parse_pair)

  m <- length(leaf_names)
  D <- matrix(0, m, m, dimnames = list(leaf_names, leaf_names))

  for (i in seq_len(m)) {
    a <- pairs[[i]]$a; b <- pairs[[i]]$b
    for (j in seq_len(m)) {
      c <- pairs[[j]]$a; d <- pairs[[j]]$b
      D[i, j] <- min(
        cell_dist(a, c) + cell_dist(b, d),
        cell_dist(a, d) + cell_dist(b, c)
      )
    }
  }

  D
}

run_dart_one <- function(spicy_sub, n_images, cond_B,
                         alpha = 0.05,
                         eps = 1e-10,
                         Mgroup = 2) {

  leaf <- extract_leaf_for_dart(spicy_sub, conditionB = cond_B, eps = eps)
  pvals <- leaf$pvals
  coefs <- leaf$coefs
  leaf_names <- names(pvals)

  D <- make_hypothesis_distance(leaf_names, major_map = MAJOR_MAP)
  D2 <- D / max(D)

  z <- qnorm(1 - as.numeric(pvals) / 2) * sign(as.numeric(coefs))
  T1 <- matrix(z, nrow = 1)

  m <- length(pvals)
  n <- n_images
  grids <- 16 / sqrt(n * log(m) * log(log(m)))

  Atree <- DART::A.tree.mult(
    grids  = grids,
    Dist0  = D2,
    Mgroup = Mgroup
  )

  res <- DART::test.mult(
    alpha = alpha,
    Llist = Atree$Llist,
    Dist0 = D2,
    T1    = T1
  )

  dart_idx <- res[[length(res)]]

  dart_reject <- rep(FALSE, m)
  if (length(dart_idx) > 0) dart_reject[dart_idx] <- TRUE

  tibble(
    leaf = leaf_names,
    pval = as.numeric(pvals),
    coef = as.numeric(coefs),
    reject_DART = dart_reject
  )
}
```

### `spe`

```{r}
dart_null_df <- purrr::imap_dfr(spicy_sub_list, \(sp_obj, cc) {
  run_dart_one(
    spicy_sub = sp_obj,
    n_images  = 200,
    cond_B    = cc,
    alpha     = 0.05
  ) %>%
    mutate(scenario = cc)
})
```


### `spe_pairs`

```{r}
dart_pairs_df <- purrr::imap_dfr(spicy_pairs_sub, \(sp_obj, scenario) {
  cond_B <- pair_table$cond_B[match(scenario, pair_table$scenario)]

  run_dart_one(
    spicy_sub = sp_obj,
    n_images  = 200,
    cond_B    = cond_B,
    alpha     = 0.05
  ) %>%
    mutate(scenario = scenario)
})
```

## p-filter

```{r}
extract_pfilter_inputs <- function(spicy_sub, spicy_major, cond_B, eps = 1e-12) {
  colB <- paste0("condition", cond_B)

  stopifnot(colB %in% colnames(spicy_sub$p.value))
  stopifnot(colB %in% colnames(spicy_major$p.value))

  # ---- major level (families)
  major_df <- tibble(
    interaction = rownames(spicy_major$p.value),
    fam = canonical_pair(rownames(spicy_major$p.value)),
    p_major = as.numeric(spicy_major$p.value[, colB])
  ) %>%
    group_by(fam) %>%
    dplyr::slice(1) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(p_major = pmin(pmax(p_major, eps), 1 - eps)) %>%
    arrange(fam)

  # ---- leaf level (subtype pairs)
  sub_df <- tibble(
    interaction = rownames(spicy_sub$p.value),
    leaf = canonical_pair(rownames(spicy_sub$p.value)),
    p_sub = as.numeric(spicy_sub$p.value[, colB])
  ) %>%
    group_by(leaf) %>%
    dplyr::slice(1) %>%                 # drop A__B vs B__A duplicates
    ungroup() %>%
    tidyr::separate(leaf, into = c("a","b"), sep="__", remove = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(
      fam = canonical_pair(paste0(MAJOR_MAP[a], "__", MAJOR_MAP[b])),
      p_sub = pmin(pmax(p_sub, eps), 1 - eps)
    ) %>%
    select(leaf, fam, p_sub) %>%
    arrange(fam, leaf)

  list(major_df = major_df, sub_df = sub_df)
}


run_pfilter_one <- function(spicy_sub, spicy_major, cond_B,
                            alpha_major = 0.05,
                            alpha_leaf  = 0.05,
                            eps = 1e-12) {

  inp <- extract_pfilter_inputs(spicy_sub, spicy_major, cond_B, eps = eps)
  major_df <- inp$major_df
  sub_df   <- inp$sub_df

  n_major <- nrow(major_df)
  n_sub   <- nrow(sub_df)
  n_total <- n_major + n_sub

  # Combine p-values in the order: majors first, then leaves
  P_all <- c(major_df$p_major, sub_df$p_sub)

  # groups matrix: n_total x 2
  groups <- matrix(0L, nrow = n_total, ncol = 2)

  # Layer 1: hierarchy constraint
  # majors: 1..n_major
  groups[1:n_major, 1] <- seq_len(n_major)

  # leaves: inherit parent's major group
  parent_idx <- match(sub_df$fam, major_df$fam)
  if (anyNA(parent_idx)) {
    stop("Some leaf families did not match any major family. Check MAJOR_MAP / canonicalization.")
  }
  groups[(n_major + 1):n_total, 1] <- parent_idx

  # Layer 2: discovery layer (each test unique)
  groups[, 2] <- seq_len(n_total)

  # Run pfilter (from your pfilter.R)
  res <- pfilter(
    P      = P_all,
    alphas = c(alpha_major, alpha_leaf),
    groups = groups
  )

  # Extract leaf rejections (last n_sub)
  leaf_reject <- res[(n_major + 1):n_total] == 1

  # Return tidy table at leaf level
  tibble(
    condition = cond_B,
    leaf      = sub_df$leaf,
    fam       = sub_df$fam,
    pval      = sub_df$p_sub,
    reject    = leaf_reject
  ) %>% arrange(fam, pval)
}
```


### `spe`

```{r}
pfilter_null_df <- purrr::imap_dfr(spicy_sub_list, \(sp_sub, cc) {
  run_pfilter_one(
    spicy_sub   = sp_sub,
    spicy_major = spicy_major_list[[cc]],
    cond_B      = cc,
    alpha_major = 0.05,
    alpha_leaf  = 0.05
  ) %>%
    mutate(scenario = cc)
})
```


### `spe_pairs`

```{r}
pfilter_pairs_df <- purrr::imap_dfr(spicy_pairs_sub, \(sp_sub, scenario) {
  cond_B <- pair_table$cond_B[match(scenario, pair_table$scenario)]

  run_pfilter_one(
    spicy_sub   = sp_sub,
    spicy_major = spicy_pairs_major[[scenario]],
    cond_B      = cond_B,
    alpha_major = 0.05,
    alpha_leaf  = 0.05
  ) %>%
    mutate(scenario = scenario)
})
```

## Our Method

```{r}
make_tree_df_from_spicy <- function(spicy_major, spicy_sub, cond_B, eps = 1e-12) {
  colB <- paste0("condition", cond_B)

  stopifnot(colB %in% colnames(spicy_major$p.value))
  stopifnot(colB %in% colnames(spicy_sub$p.value))

  # ---- Level 1: major families
  maj_df <- tibble(
    interaction = rownames(spicy_major$p.value),
    node = canonical_pair(rownames(spicy_major$p.value)),
    level = 1L,
    parent = NA_character_,
    pvalue = as.numeric(spicy_major$p.value[, colB])
  ) %>%
    group_by(node) %>% dplyr::slice(1) %>% ungroup() %>%   # drop duplicates after canonicalization
    mutate(pvalue = pmin(pmax(pvalue, eps), 1 - eps)) %>%
    select(node, level, parent, pvalue)

  # ---- Level 2: subtype leaves
  leaf_df <- tibble(
    interaction = rownames(spicy_sub$p.value),
    node = canonical_pair(rownames(spicy_sub$p.value)),
    level = 2L,
    pvalue = as.numeric(spicy_sub$p.value[, colB])
  ) %>%
    group_by(node) %>% dplyr::slice(1) %>% ungroup() %>%   # drop duplicates after canonicalization
    tidyr::separate(node, into = c("a","b"), sep="__", remove = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(
      parent = canonical_pair(paste0(MAJOR_MAP[a], "__", MAJOR_MAP[b])),
      pvalue = pmin(pmax(pvalue, eps), 1 - eps)
    ) %>%
    select(node, level, parent, pvalue)

  # keep only leaves whose parent exists in major level
  leaf_df <- leaf_df %>% filter(parent %in% maj_df$node)

  bind_rows(maj_df, leaf_df) %>%
    arrange(level, parent, node)
}

run_ours_one <- function(spicy_major, spicy_sub, cond_B, q = 0.05) {
  tree_df <- make_tree_df_from_spicy(spicy_major, spicy_sub, cond_B)

  res_ours <- run_levelwise_bh(tree_df, q = q)

  leaf_df <- tree_df %>% filter(level == 2)

  # vanilla BH across all leaves
  bh_all <- bh_reject(leaf_df$pvalue, q = q)
  bh_set <- leaf_df$node[bh_all]

  our_set <- res_ours %>% filter(level == 2, reject) %>% pull(node)

  list(
    tree_df = tree_df,
    res_ours = res_ours,
    sig_families = res_ours %>% filter(level == 1, reject),
    sig_leaves = res_ours %>% filter(level == 2, reject),
    compare = list(
      BH_all_n = length(bh_set),
      Our_n = length(our_set),
      overlap_n = length(intersect(bh_set, our_set)),
      ours_only = setdiff(our_set, bh_set),
      bh_only = setdiff(bh_set, our_set)
    )
  )
}

run_levelwise_bh <- function(tree_df, q = 0.05) {
  L1 <- tree_df %>% filter(level == 1)
  L2 <- tree_df %>% filter(level == 2)

  # Level 1 BH across majors
  L1 <- L1 %>%
    mutate(tested = TRUE,
           reject = bh_reject(pvalue, q))

  sig_parents <- L1$node[L1$reject]

  # Level 2 BH within selected major families only
  L2 <- L2 %>%
    mutate(tested = parent %in% sig_parents,
           reject = FALSE)

  if (any(L2$tested)) {
    idx <- which(L2$tested)
    L2$reject[idx] <- bh_reject(L2$pvalue[idx], q)
  }

  bind_rows(L1, L2) %>% arrange(level, parent, node)
}
```

### `spe`

```{r}
ours_null_out <- purrr::imap(spicy_sub_list, \(sp_sub, cc) {
  run_ours_one(
    spicy_major = spicy_major_list[[cc]],
    spicy_sub   = sp_sub,
    cond_B      = cc,
    q           = 0.05
  )
})
names(ours_null_out) <- names(spicy_sub_list)
```

### `spe_pairs`

```{r}
ours_pairs_out <- purrr::imap(spicy_pairs_sub, \(sp_sub, scenario) {
  cond_B <- pair_table$cond_B[match(scenario, pair_table$scenario)]

  run_ours_one(
    spicy_major = spicy_pairs_major[[scenario]],
    spicy_sub   = sp_sub,
    cond_B      = cond_B,
    q           = 0.05
  )
})
names(ours_pairs_out) <- names(spicy_pairs_sub)
```

# Exact Results 

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# BH
# -----------------------------
bh_df <- bind_rows(
  bh_null_df %>%
    transmute(
      scenario,
      leaf,
      method = "BH",
      reject = reject_BH
    ),
  
  bh_pairs_df %>%
    transmute(
      scenario,
      leaf,
      method = "BH",
      reject = reject_BH
    )
)

# -----------------------------
# TreeBH
# -----------------------------
treebh_df <- bind_rows(
  treebh_null_df %>%
    transmute(
      scenario,
      leaf,
      method = "TreeBH",
      reject = reject_TreeBH
    ),
  
  treebh_pairs_df %>%
    transmute(
      scenario,
      leaf,
      method = "TreeBH",
      reject = reject_TreeBH
    )
)

# -----------------------------
# DART
# -----------------------------
dart_df <- bind_rows(
  dart_null_df %>%
    transmute(
      scenario,
      leaf,
      method = "DART",
      reject = reject_DART
    ),
  
  dart_pairs_df %>%
    transmute(
      scenario,
      leaf,
      method = "DART",
      reject = reject_DART
    )
)

# -----------------------------
# p-filter
# -----------------------------
pfilter_df <- bind_rows(
  pfilter_null_df %>%
    transmute(
      scenario,
      leaf,
      method = "pfilter",
      reject
    ),
  
  pfilter_pairs_df %>%
    transmute(
      scenario,
      leaf,
      method = "pfilter",
      reject
    )
)
```

```{r}
ours_null_df <- purrr::imap_dfr(ours_null_out, function(obj, scenario) {
  
  obj$res_ours %>%
    filter(level == 2) %>%
    transmute(
      scenario = scenario,
      leaf = node,
      method = "Ours",
      reject
    )
})

ours_pairs_df <- purrr::imap_dfr(ours_pairs_out, function(obj, scenario) {
  
  obj$res_ours %>%
    filter(level == 2) %>%
    transmute(
      scenario = scenario,
      leaf = node,
      method = "Ours",
      reject
    )
})

ours_df <- bind_rows(ours_null_df, ours_pairs_df)
```

```{r}
all_results <- bind_rows(
  bh_df,
  treebh_df,
  dart_df,
  pfilter_df,
  ours_df
)
```

```{r}
discoveries <- all_results %>%
  group_by(method, scenario) %>%
  summarise(
    n_discoveries = sum(reject),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

discoveries
```
```{r}
leaf_discoveries <- all_results %>%
  group_by(method, scenario) %>%
  summarise(
    n_discoveries = sum(reject),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    signal_type = case_when(
      str_detect(scenario, "LeafSignal|Leaf_") ~ "LeafSignal",
      str_detect(scenario, "InternalSignal|Internal_") ~ "InternalSignal",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )


p_leafsignal <- leaf_discoveries %>%
  filter(signal_type == "LeafSignal") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = scenario, y = n_discoveries, fill = method)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Method Comparison for LeafSignal Scenarios",
    x = "Scenario",
    y = "Number of Discoveries"
  )

p_internalsignal <- leaf_discoveries %>%
  filter(signal_type == "InternalSignal") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = scenario, y = n_discoveries, fill = method)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Method Comparison for InternalSignal Scenarios",
    x = "Scenario",
    y = "Number of Discoveries"
  )
```

```{r}
p_leafsignal
p_internalsignal
```





```{r}
method_agreement <- all_results %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = method,
    values_from = reject
  )

method_agreement %>%
  summarise(
    BH_vs_Ours = mean(BH == Ours),
    TreeBH_vs_Ours = mean(TreeBH == Ours),
    DART_vs_Ours = mean(DART == Ours),
    pfilter_vs_Ours = mean(pfilter == Ours)
  )
```
